titleStmt.title: Letter from James Jackson to The Librarian, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland, 27 November 1915
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: James Herbert Jackson

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p:
Letter from James Herbert Jackson acknowledging the Royal College of Physician of Ireland's request and enclosing copies of Dr Burke's conviction certificates.
In 1916 the serving librarian of the RCPI was Mr Robert Phelps.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.placeName: West Ham Police, Court, West Ham Lane, Stratford , England
Royal College of Physicians, Kildare Street, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
WEST HAM POLICE COURT,
WEST HAM LANE,
STRATFORD. E. 27th November 1915. Sir, I beg to acknowledge receipt of your letter of the
25th instant enclosing P O for 2/- asking for copy convictions
of Dr Ulick Burke who was convicted at this Court for
drunkeness. I now enclose you copies of two convictioned s entered in
the Court Register. I am,
Sir,
Your obedient servant J.H. Jackson
Clerk to the Justices The Librarian
Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
Kildare Street
Dublin
COUNTY BOROUGH OF WEST HAM. MEMORANDUM of a Conviction entered in the Register of the Court of Summary Jurisdiction
sitting at the Police Court West Ham Lane Stratford. TUESDAY the Eighth day of June 1915. No. Name of Informant Name of Defendant Nature of Offence Date of Offence Plea Minute of Adjudication
2859 Edwards P C 685k Burke Ulick (52) Drunk & Disorderly 7-6-15 Guilty 10/- or 7 days R A Gillespie
Police Magistrate
I certify the above to be true copy. James H. Jackson
Clerk of the said Court of Summary Jurisdiction Dated this 26th day of November 1915. MaerC.
3.XII.15
